title: Misfit
tmdbOverview: Julia, a teenager from Latin America, has lived in the U.S. most of her life. She is popular, a successful Youtuber and wants to become prom queen. Everything changes abruptly when her family has to return to Ecuador. What will she have to face? Getting used to a new culture and a catholic high school will not be easy. The "gringa" becomes the target of "La Reinas", three popular bullies who rule the school. Julia is now a misfit who will have to earn her new friends' affection in order to survive.
synopsis: Misfit (2021) is a comedy and romance film in Spanish. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on TMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 12 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
